category_sources: source_facts.description says SSL/TLS VPN implementing OSI layer 2 or 3 secure network extension; official GitHub README describes OpenVPN as a secure tunneling daemon.
display_name_sources: Official OpenVPN site and GitHub repository use "OpenVPN"; source_facts.name is openvpn.
docs_sources: Official OpenVPN community docs provide user/community documentation; OpenVPN GitHub Pages hosts generated source-code documentation from the official project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official OpenVPN GitHub organization repository OpenVPN/openvpn is described as the open source VPN daemon.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable identify VPN CLI; official README describes secure tunneling and OpenVPN protocol documentation.
